characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The titular characters. They are genie sisters who grant Leah's wishes. Be Careful What You Wish For: In "Zeta in Training", Zeta must grant Shimmer and Shine three wishes as part of her second chance as a genie-in-training and, at some point, asks them what the biggest and most powerful gem looks like and they unwittingly reply with "Wish we knew", allowing Zeta to use their last wish to get said gem. Benevolent Genie: They try their best to grant wishes for Leah. But Thou Must!: Once they hear a wish, they must grant it no matter what. Curtains Match the Window: Inverted; each genie's eye color is the opposite girl's hair color.

characters.name: Shimmer and Shine
characters.description: The titular characters. They are genie sisters who grant Leah's wishes. Be Careful What You Wish For: In "Zeta in Training", Zeta must grant Shimmer and Shine three wishes as part of her second chance as a genie-in-training and, at some point, asks them what the biggest and most powerful gem looks like and they unwittingly reply with "Wish we knew", allowing Zeta to use their last wish to get said gem. Benevolent Genie: They try their best to grant wishes for Leah. But Thou Must!: Once they hear a wish, they must grant it no matter what. Curtains Match the Window: Inverted; each genie's eye color is the opposite girl's hair color.

characters.name: Leah
characters.description: Be Careful What You Wish For/Wasteful Wishing: She sometimes words her wishes in a way that can be misinterpreted by the genie sisters. Becoming the Genie: During Season 3, she wishes to become a genie for a day, so she can grant wishes and help people. Zeta ends up holding her bottle, and wants to use Leah's new power for evil, but she twists around her wishes. Genki Girl: She acts very excitable when happy. Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: SeeThe Heartbelow. The Heart: It's subtle, but she tends to bring out the good in others through sheer determination and kindness.

characters.name: Zac
characters.description: Leah's guy friend and neighbor. Ascended Extra: Zach earns himself a much more prominent role in Season 2, Even getting a Genie of his own I Meant to Do That: Zac says this to Leah after crashing into asecondmailbox in "Backyard Ballet". Locked Out of the Loop: Is this in the first season on Leah having genies. Mistaken for Own Murderer: In "The Mysterious Tower", Zac finds a necklace that turns him into a Ziffilon-like monster. Kaz briefly assumes the monster ate Zac.

characters.name: Princess Samira
characters.description: Tomboy and Girly Girl: The girly girl to Zeta's tomboy.

characters.name: Zeta
characters.description: A sorceress who wants to be the most powerful being in the world. She has a sister who quit sorcery to be a genie. Adaptational Attractiveness:In this art from the S&S crew.◊ Ambition Is Evil: She wants to become the most powerful being around, and will go to almost any lengths to achieve this goal. Be Careful What You Wish For: During Season 3, Leah wishes to become a genie for a day, and Zeta uses a potion to get Leah to grant her wishes, but she purposely misinterprets them so Zeta can't use her wishes for evil. Cue the Rain: In "Now You See Her", after a forced landing, Zeta is glad that at least it's not raining. Nazboo congratulates Zeta for the subsequent rain. Zeta later tries to tell him at least it's not snowing but snow falls right before she says "snowing".

characters.name: Kaz
characters.description: Shimmer and Shine's male genie friend. Comically Missing the Point: When Kaz expresses his desire to have a pet Ziffilon and says how hard it is to get one, Zac says he can help. Kaz must be outright told Zac means wishing for it. Magical Incantation: Has one whenever he grants a wish.''Boom, Zahramay! *Numbered wish* of the day! Flash and pizzazz, *the wish here* by Kaz! Nervous Wreck: Very timid and meek, especially when facing the unknown.

characters.name: Captain Zora
characters.description: A pirate genie who is Shine's idol. Dressed to Plunder: Her pirate outfit is complete with boot spurs shaped like a skull and crossbones. The Klutz: She is very clumsy and absentminded. She even met Shimmer and Shine by accidentally dropping her anchor in front of their palace. Non-Human Sidekick: Has an unidentified magical creature named Scallywag as a first mate.

characters.name: Empress Caliana
characters.description: Princess Samira's former teacher and mentor. Celebrity Voice Actor: Voiced byBarbara Eden, akaJeannie the genie. Cool Teacher: In "The Crystal Queen," she teaches Shimmer and Shine all while exploring the crystal caves, battling a crystalline golem, and riding rockslides.

characters.name: Arabella
characters.description: The Apprentice: She's this to the heroines.

characters.name: Uzma
characters.description: Arc Villainess: She's the main villain for the Oceanea episodes, including the series finale. Excessive Evil Eyeshadow: She wears harsh red eyeshadow to accentuate her villainous appearance. Prongs of Poseidon: She carries a magic trident that she uses to cast spells. Viler New Villain: She's sneakier than Zeta and willing to harm Nazboo to get what she wants, which puts her at odds with Zeta as well as the genies.

characters.name: Nahal and Tala
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: Not Tala, but Nahal, who usually suffers some slapstick experience.

characters.name: Roya
characters.description: Animal Gender-Bender: A female peafowl (peahen) that has tail feathers of a male peafowl (peacock)

characters.name: Nazboo
characters.description: Minion with an F in Evil: He loyally serves Zeta, but doesn't have it in him for any actual evil-doing. Morality Pet: Serves as this to Zeta at times, such as in "Volcano Drain-o", where he nudged Zeta into thanking the girls for saving her. Vile Villain, Laughable Lackey: Downplayed as Zeta isn't necessarily vile, but Nazboo is often a source of comedy.

characters.name: Rocket
characters.description: Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: He has yet to be seen in season two, mostly because the action has moved to Zahramay Falls. He eventually returned in "Hounded". Precious Puppies: A cute and playful pup.

characters.name: Parisa
characters.description: Visible Invisibility: She can camouflage herself but leaves an outline for the viewers to know where she is.

characters.name: Zain
characters.description: Gentle Giant: Despite his size, he's very sweet. Our Griffons Are Different: A Ziffilon is similar in appearance to a griffon, but colored blue, gold and pink.
